description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-progress-bar` (T1-08) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-bar/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, value/max/min typed as numbers, indeterminate prop typed, label/description typed
2. Accessibility — `role="progressbar"`, aria-valuenow/min/max, indeterminate uses aria-valuenow omitted, accessible label required, live region for completion, axe-core pass
3. Tests — determinate (0%, 50%, 100%), indeterminate, label updates, completion event, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — determinate/indeterminate variants, all sizes
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, smooth animation for indeterminate, CSS parts (track, fill)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-bar/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-progress-bar — T1-08 antagonistic quality review
